content.content:
class Autocompletable::UsersController < ApplicationController
  def index
    set_page_and_extract_portion_from find_autocompletable_users.with_attached_avatar.ordered, per_page: 20
  end

  private
    def find_autocompletable_users
      params[:query].present? ? users_scope.active.filtered_by(params[:query]) : users_scope.active
    end

    def users_scope
      params[:room_id].present? ? Current.user.rooms.find(params[:room_id]).users : User.all
    end
end

content.content: (Bash completed with no output)

class User < ApplicationRecord
  include Avatar, Bannable, Bot, Mentionable, Role, Transferable

  has_many :memberships, dependent: :delete_all
  has_many :rooms, through: :memberships

  has_many :reachable_messages, through: :rooms, source: :messages
  has_many :messages, dependent: :destroy, foreign_key: :creator_id

  has_many :push_subscriptions, class_name: "Push::Subscription", dependent: :delete_all

  has_many :boosts, dependent: :destroy, foreign_key: :booster_id
  has_many :searches, dependent: :delete_all

  has_many :sessions, dependent: :destroy
  has_many :bans, dependent: :destroy

  enum :status, %i[ active deactivated banned ], default: :active

  has_secure_password validations: false

  after_create_commit :grant_membership_to_open_rooms

  scope :ordered, -> { order("LOWER(name)") }
  scope :filtered_by, ->(query) { where("name like ?", "%#{query}%") }

  def initials
    name.scan(/\b\w/).join
  end

  def title
    [ name, bio ].compact_blank.join(" – ")
  end

  def deactivate
    transaction do
      close_remote_connections

      memberships.without_direct_rooms.delete_all
      push_subscriptions.delete_all
      searches.delete_all
      sessions.delete_all

      update! status: :deactivated, email_address: deactived_email_address
    end
  end

  def reset_remote_connections
    close_remote_connections reconnect: true
  end

  private
    def grant_membership_to_open_rooms
      Membership.insert_all(Rooms::Open.pluck(:id).collect { |room_id| { room_id: room_id, user_id: id } })
    end

    def deactived_email_address
      email_address&.gsub(/@/, "-deactivated-#{SecureRandom.uuid}@")
    end

    def close_remote_connections(reconnect: false)
      ActionCable.server.remote_connections.where(current_user: self).disconnect reconnect: reconnect
    end
end

class User < ApplicationRecord
  include Avatar, Bannable, Bot, Mentionable, Role, Transferable

  has_many :memberships, dependent: :delete_all
  has_many :rooms, through: :memberships

  has_many :reachable_messages, through: :rooms, source: :messages
  has_many :messages, dependent: :destroy, foreign_key: :creator_id

  has_many :push_subscriptions, class_name: "Push::Subscription", dependent: :delete_all

  has_many :boosts, dependent: :destroy, foreign_key: :booster_id
  has_many :searches, dependent: :delete_all

  has_many :sessions, dependent: :destroy
  has_many :bans, dependent: :destroy

  enum :status, %i[ active deactivated banned ], default: :active

  has_secure_password validations: false

  after_create_commit :grant_membership_to_open_rooms

  scope :ordered, -> { order("LOWER(name)") }
  scope :filtered_by, ->(query) { where("name like ?", "%#{query}%") }

  def initials
    name.scan(/\b\w/).join
  end

  def title
    [ name, bio ].compact_blank.join(" – ")
  end

  def deactivate
    transaction do
      close_remote_connections

      memberships.without_direct_rooms.delete_all
      push_subscriptions.delete_all
      searches.delete_all
      sessions.delete_all

      update! status: :deactivated, email_address: deactived_email_address
    end
  end

  def reset_remote_connections
    close_remote_connections reconnect: true
  end

  private
    def grant_membership_to_open_rooms
      Membership.insert_all(Rooms::Open.pluck(:id).collect { |room_id| { room_id: room_id, user_id: id } })
    end

    def deactived_email_address
      email_address&.gsub(/@/, "-deactivated-#{SecureRandom.uuid}@")
    end

    def close_remote_connections(reconnect: false)
      ActionCable.server.remote_connections.where(current_user: self).disconnect reconnect: reconnect
    end
end

content.content:
require "test_helper"

class Autocompletable::UsersControllerTest < ActionDispatch::IntegrationTest
  setup do
    sign_in :david
  end

  test "search returns matching users" do
    get autocompletable_users_url(format: :json), params: { query: "da" }

    assert_response :success
    assert_equal "David", response.parsed_body.first["name"]
  end

  test "search results escape HTML in names" do
    users(:david).update!(name: "David <script>alert(123)</script>")

    get autocompletable_users_url(format: :json), params: { query: "da" }

    assert_response :success
    assert_equal "David <script>alert(123)</script>", response.parsed_body.first["name"]
  end

  test "room search returns matching users" do
    get autocompletable_users_url(room_id: rooms(:hq).id, format: :json), params: { query: "da" }

    assert_response :success
    assert_equal "David", response.parsed_body.first["name"]
  end

  test "room search is scoped by membership" do
    sign_in :kevin

    assert_not_includes users(:kevin).rooms, rooms(:watercooler)

    assert_raises ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound do
      get autocompletable_users_url(room_id: rooms(:watercooler).id, format: :json), params: { query: "da" }
    end
  end
end

  test "search results escape HTML in names" do
    users(:david).update!(name: "David <script>alert(123)</script>")

    get autocompletable_users_url(format: :json), params: { query: "da" }

    assert_response :success
    assert_equal "David <script>alert(123)</script>", response.parsed_body.first["name"]
  end

  test "room search returns matching users" do
    get autocompletable_users_url(room_id: rooms(:hq).id, format: :json), params: { query: "da" }

    assert_response :success
    assert_equal "David", response.parsed_body.first["name"]

  test "room search is scoped by membership" do
    sign_in :kevin

    assert_not_includes users(:kevin).rooms, rooms(:watercooler)

    assert_raises ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound do
      get autocompletable_users_url(room_id: rooms(:watercooler).id, format: :json), params: { query: "da" }
    end
  end
end

content.content:
class Users::SidebarsController < ApplicationController
  DIRECT_PLACEHOLDERS = 20

  def show
    all_memberships     = Current.user.memberships.visible.with_ordered_room
    @direct_memberships = extract_direct_memberships(all_memberships)
    @other_memberships  = all_memberships.without(@direct_memberships)

    @direct_placeholder_users = find_direct_placeholder_users
  end

  private
    def extract_direct_memberships(all_memberships)
      all_memberships.select { |m| m.room.direct? }.sort_by { |m| m.room.updated_at }.reverse
    end

    def find_direct_placeholder_users
      exclude_user_ids = user_ids_already_in_direct_rooms_with_current_user.including(Current.user.id)
      User.active.where.not(id: exclude_user_ids).order(:created_at).limit(DIRECT_PLACEHOLDERS - exclude_user_ids.count)
    end

    def user_ids_already_in_direct_rooms_with_current_user
      Membership.where(room_id: Current.user.rooms.directs.pluck(:id)).pluck(:user_id).uniq
    end
end

class Users::SidebarsController < ApplicationController
  DIRECT_PLACEHOLDERS = 20

  def show
    all_memberships     = Current.user.memberships.visible.with_ordered_room
    @direct_memberships = extract_direct_memberships(all_memberships)
    @other_memberships  = all_memberships.without(@direct_memberships)

    @direct_placeholder_users = find_direct_placeholder_users
  end

  private
    def extract_direct_memberships(all_memberships)
      all_memberships.select { |m| m.room.direct? }.sort_by { |m| m.room.updated_at }.reverse
    end

    def find_direct_placeholder_users
      exclude_user_ids = user_ids_already_in_direct_rooms_with_current_user.including(Current.user.id)
      User.active.where.not(id: exclude_user_ids).order(:created_at).limit(DIRECT_PLACEHOLDERS - exclude_user_ids.count)
    end

    def user_ids_already_in_direct_rooms_with_current_user
      Membership.where(room_id: Current.user.rooms.directs.pluck(:id)).pluck(:user_id).uniq
    end
end

require "test_helper"

class Autocompletable::UsersControllerTest < ActionDispatch::IntegrationTest
  setup do
    sign_in :david
  end

  test "search returns matching users" do
    get autocompletable_users_url(format: :json), params: { query: "da" }

    assert_response :success
    assert_equal "David", response.parsed_body.first["name"]
  end

  test "search results escape HTML in names" do
    users(:david).update!(name: "David <script>alert(123)</script>")

    get autocompletable_users_url(format: :json), params: { query: "da" }

    assert_response :success
    assert_equal "David <script>alert(123)</script>", response.parsed_body.first["name"]
  end

  test "room search returns matching users" do
    get autocompletable_users_url(room_id: rooms(:hq).id, format: :json), params: { query: "da" }

    assert_response :success
    assert_equal "David", response.parsed_body.first["name"]
  end

  test "room search is scoped by membership" do
    sign_in :kevin

    assert_not_includes users(:kevin).rooms, rooms(:watercooler)

    assert_raises ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound do
      get autocompletable_users_url(room_id: rooms(:watercooler).id, format: :json), params: { query: "da" }
    end
  end
end

input.new_string:
test "room search is scoped by membership" do
    sign_in :kevin

    assert_not_includes users(:kevin).rooms, rooms(:watercooler)

    assert_raises ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound do
      get autocompletable_users_url(room_id: rooms(:watercooler).id, format: :json), params: { query: "da" }
    end
  end

  test "except excludes matching users given as an array" do
    get autocompletable_users_url(format: :json), params: { query: "da", except: [ users(:david).id ] }

    assert_response :success
    assert_empty response.parsed_body
  end

  test "except excludes matching users given as a comma-separated list" do
    get autocompletable_users_url(format: :json), params: { query: "da", except: users(:david).id.to_s }

    assert_response :success
    assert_empty response.parsed_body
  end

  test "except excludes matching users in room search" do
    get autocompletable_users_url(room_id: rooms(:hq).id, format: :json), params: { query: "da", except: users(:david).id.to_s }

    assert_response :success
    assert_empty response.parsed_body
  end

  test "without except, autocomplete behavior is unchanged" do
    get autocompletable_users_url(format: :json), params: { query: "da" }

    assert_response :success
    assert_equal "David", response.parsed_body.first["name"]
  end
end

tool_use_result.originalFile:
require "test_helper"

class Autocompletable::UsersControllerTest < ActionDispatch::IntegrationTest
  setup do
    sign_in :david
  end

  test "search returns matching users" do
    get autocompletable_users_url(format: :json), params: { query: "da" }

    assert_response :success
    assert_equal "David", response.parsed_body.first["name"]
  end

  test "search results escape HTML in names" do
    users(:david).update!(name: "David <script>alert(123)</script>")

    get autocompletable_users_url(format: :json), params: { query: "da" }

    assert_response :success
    assert_equal "David <script>alert(123)</script>", response.parsed_body.first["name"]
  end

  test "room search returns matching users" do
    get autocompletable_users_url(room_id: rooms(:hq).id, format: :json), params: { query: "da" }

    assert_response :success
    assert_equal "David", response.parsed_body.first["name"]
  end

  test "room search is scoped by membership" do
    sign_in :kevin

    assert_not_includes users(:kevin).rooms, rooms(:watercooler)

    assert_raises ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound do
      get autocompletable_users_url(room_id: rooms(:watercooler).id, format: :json), params: { query: "da" }
    end
  end
end

content.text:
## Summary

Added an optional `except` parameter to `Autocompletable::UsersController#index` (`app/controllers/autocompletable/users_controller.rb:5-20`):

- `excluded_user_ids` normalizes `params[:except]` via `Array(...).flat_map { split(",") }`, handling both array-of-ids and comma-separated-string submissions.
- `find_autocompletable_users` applies `.where.not(id: excluded_user_ids)` only when exclusions are present, following the existing `where.not(id: ...)` convention used in `users/sidebars_controller.rb` and `rooms/closeds_controller.rb`. Behavior with no `except` param is untouched, and exclusion composes with both `users_scope` variants (plain `User.all` and room-scoped).

Added 4 tests covering array form, comma-separated form, room-scoped exclusion, and the unchanged no-`except` path.

**Proof:**
- `bin/rails test test/controllers/autocompletable/users_controller_test.rb` → 8 runs, 29 assertions, 0 failures, 0 errors.
- `bundle exec rake test` → 249 runs, 727 assertions, 0 failures, 1 error. The 1 error (`Message::AttachmentTest#test_creating_a_message_creates_video_preview`) is a pre-existing local environment issue (missing `libjxl` dylib for `ffprobe`) — reproduced identically by stashing my changes and running against unmodified `main`, so it's unrelated to this change.

Changes are left uncommitted in the working tree as requested.

## Summary

Added an optional `except` parameter to `Autocompletable::UsersController#index` (`app/controllers/autocompletable/users_controller.rb:5-20`):

- `excluded_user_ids` normalizes `params[:except]` via `Array(...).flat_map { split(",") }`, handling both array-of-ids and comma-separated-string submissions.
- `find_autocompletable_users` applies `.where.not(id: excluded_user_ids)` only when exclusions are present, following the existing `where.not(id: ...)` convention used in `users/sidebars_controller.rb` and `rooms/closeds_controller.rb`. Behavior with no `except` param is untouched, and exclusion composes with both `users_scope` variants (plain `User.all` and room-scoped).

Added 4 tests covering array form, comma-separated form, room-scoped exclusion, and the unchanged no-`except` path.

**Proof:**
- `bin/rails test test/controllers/autocompletable/users_controller_test.rb` → 8 runs, 29 assertions, 0 failures, 0 errors.
- `bundle exec rake test` → 249 runs, 727 assertions, 0 failures, 1 error. The 1 error (`Message::AttachmentTest#test_creating_a_message_creates_video_preview`) is a pre-existing local environment issue (missing `libjxl` dylib for `ffprobe`) — reproduced identically by stashing my changes and running against unmodified `main`, so it's unrelated to this change.

Changes are left uncommitted in the working tree as requested.
